## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Understory's platform and service delivery process for GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Understory uniquely blends paid media and go-to-market engineering for optimal results](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Process involves intake forms, strategy development, and bespoke implementation plans](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team structure includes specialists for each channel and oversight from Alex and Ali](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Reporting done via HubSpot, Looker dashboards, Slack notifications, and Google Slides](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Clay used extensively for data enrichment, audience targeting, and workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

## Topics

### Client Onboarding Process

  - [Intake form guides initial builds and strategy preparation](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Paid Media: Set up ad accounts, prepare strategy based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Go-to-Market Engineering: Develop implementation plan with campaign ideas, segments, personalization variables, triggers, and signals](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Strategy development heavily relies on team's extensive experience](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Kickoff presentations created for both paid media and go-to-market engineering sides](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Service Delivery and Reporting

  - [Paid Media: Uses Looker dashboards, Slack notifications for real-time lead gen tracking](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Go-to-Market Engineering: Primarily uses HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Weekly update decks created in Google Slides for most clients](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Working to streamline process for automatic deck creation from intake form data](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Team Structure

  - [Paid Media: Channel-specific specialist + head of channel + Ali's oversight](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Go-to-Market Engineering: Head of GTM engineering, GTM engineer, GTM ops person, RevOps manager + Alex's oversight](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Expertise in both paid media and Clay usage sets Understory apart from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)

### Clay Workflow Examples

  - [Remofirst campaign: Scraping job postings to identify potential clients needing employer of record services](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Social content engagement targeting: Scraping LinkedIn for prospects engaging with relevant content, enriching data, and automating outreach](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

### Client Qualification and Limitations

  - [Disqualify clients with low ACV where positive ROI is unlikely](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Advise against outbound campaigns for audiences not receptive (e.g., cybersecurity professionals)](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Minimum ad spend of $15-20K/month recommended for effective testing](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Primary KPI for most clients: Demos booked](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Track cost per lead, meeting request to booking rate, progression to opportunity stage, and closed-won deals](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Example: Sunry client achieving 50-60 demo requests/month from LinkedIn ads at \~$800 cost per lead](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ali to send over the kickoff deck example](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create artifacts and strategy based on information gathered](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Upcoming kickoff meeting scheduled with Drew and Jason from Understory team](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [GrowthX to keep Understory updated on progress and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/v_wicMBf7rqTzKPWCMJmzs7D7WeJk5-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
